description: Fully automated daily workflow for Shapiro contrarian analysis. Runs the Python data pipeline, reads FT newsletters via Gmail MCP, scores markets using COT positioning + news failures + narrative alignment, updates memory, sends alerts for high-confidence setups, and generates a comprehensive daily analysis report. Replaces the /shapiro skill entirely.

params.name: lookback_days
params.description: How many days back to search for FT newsletters in Gmail

steps.name: run-pipeline
steps.goal_summary: Execute python -m shapiro.runner to generate shapiro_report.json with COT percentiles, economic events, and news failures per market.

steps.name: load-context
steps.goal_summary: Read shapiro_report.json, shapiro_memory.md (if exists), and all data/narratives/*.md files. Prepare a context summary for subsequent steps.

steps.name: analyze-newsletters
steps.goal_summary: Search Gmail for FT newsletters (label:FT-Newsletters) from the last {lookback_days} days. Read all new newsletters, identify affected watchlist markets, and update data/narratives/{SYMBOL}.md for each affected market. Apply narrative freshness rules.

steps.name: score-markets
steps.goal_summary: For each market with COT extreme positioning (percentile >=70 or <=30): compute Shapiro score using COT Component (0-40), News Failure Component (0-35), and FT Narrative Component (0-25). Interpret narrative alignment as contrarian signal. Assign confidence levels (CONVICTION/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW).

steps.name: update-memory
steps.goal_summary: Write updated shapiro_memory.md with active setups, key observations, watch-tomorrow items, and changes from previous run.

steps.name: send-alerts
steps.goal_summary: For markets with score >= 70 (HIGH or CONVICTION): send Pushover notification (priority 0 for HIGH, 1 for CONVICTION) and email alert via shapiro.notifier.

steps.name: write-analysis
steps.goal_summary: Generate comprehensive shapiro_daily_analysis.md in Bulgarian. Include per-market scoring tables, contrarian thesis, risk/confirmation tables, news failures table (score >= 65), and upcoming events. Only show markets with score >= 50.

tools.name: shapiro-runner
tools.command: cd C:/Users/aleksandar.mavrov/Projects/ElliotWaveAnalyzer && PYTHONUTF8=1 uv run python -m shapiro.runner

tools.name: shapiro-notifier
tools.command: cd C:/Users/aleksandar.mavrov/Projects/ElliotWaveAnalyzer && PYTHONUTF8=1 uv run python -c "from shapiro.notifier import PushoverNotifier, EmailNotifier; from shapiro.config import ShapiroConfig"
